svg.text: System-level chains operational from first cron pass · v0.1.0
② Session Lock — Two Release Paths
Orphan guard: lock > 25 min old → auto-clear stale
Crash counter escalates: MEDIUM at 3 · HIGH at 5
Edit one row to shift focus — no cron changes
Crons are generic pulses — intelligence lives in these 3 files
End of every worker pass → T7
Novel blockers appended as new FM entries automatically
Owner writes PA entries before going offline
T2.7 validates: exists · ACTIVE · not expired · scope matches
PA-001 and PA-002 ship prebuilt — active from first pass
bootstrap skipped · saves ~5K tokens per pass
Read first · distilled from SOUL.md · ~800 tokens
• Prompt injection via fetched web content
If diverges from SOUL.md: SOUL.md wins
